meaning: adv.不踌躇地,坚定地,迅速地
examples: I would unhesitatingly choose the latter option.
"The two goals against Sun Hei, " he answers unhesitatingly.
When confronted by members of Congress, Hamilton unhesitatingly told them the detailed truth.
When asked to divide one integer by another, he unhesitatingly recites the answer to 60 decimal places.
